title: Update a specific bit field in packed uint256 using XOR diff — no masking constants needed
trigger_patterns: update one field in packed slot
description: To update field at bit offset N: compute diff = xor(newValue, oldField), shift to position = shl(N, diff), apply = xor(packed, shifted). Only bits that actually changed are flipped. No mask constant needed — the diff itself acts as a mask. Works for any field width.
when_to_apply: Updating a single field in a packed uint256 when the field offset is known at compile time
when_not_to_apply: When the new value must be range-validated before writing, or when multiple fields change simultaneously
